contract_claim: The method is called 'getCurrentWorkingDirectory', which implies currency/live value — and indeed it calls process.cwd() live (L39). However, the class-level comment (L8-10) says it provides 'access to real process environment variables and working directory' without clarifying that the working directory is live while env vars are snapshotted. This asymmetry is undocumented and could mislead consumers who assume consistent snapshotting behaviour.
observed_behavior: The method is called 'getCurrentWorkingDirectory', which implies currency/live value — and indeed it calls process.cwd() live (L39). However, the class-level comment (L8-10) says it provides 'access to real process environment variables and working directory' without clarifying that the working directory is live while env vars are snapshotted. This asymmetry is undocumented and could mislead consumers who assume consistent snapshotting behaviour.
